Port D Data Direction

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x28
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Direction control for Port D pins. 0=Input, 1=Output. Default direction is configurable via GPIO_DFLT_DIR_D parameter.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] ddr rw 0x0 DDR

Field Descriptions

ddr - DDR

0=Input, 1=Output
